infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: We need access to your health data to provide personalized health insights and tracking.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: We may sync your health data across your devices.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely unlock your medical records.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is not used by this app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is not used by this app.
infoPlist.NSNotificationPermissionUsageDescription: We'll send medication reminders and important health alerts.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use Face ID to unlock your account
